# undivisible.dev

> Portfolio and contact site for Max Carter (undivisible): software systems, AI automation, and low-level tooling. Human UI is visual; agents should use plain markdown URLs below.

This site follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org/) convention: curated links to markdown sources. Fetch `text/markdown` or `text/plain` at each path. The interactive site is at https://undivisible.dev/; agent-readable bundle at https://undivisible.dev/agent.

## Primary markdown

- [Now / profile](https://undivisible.dev/now.md): Current focus, project list, and short bio (synced from GitHub `now.md` or README).
- [Resume](https://undivisible.dev/resume.md): Full CV — experience, skills, contact.
- [AGENTS.md](https://undivisible.dev/agents.md): Repo agent instructions for contributors and coding agents.

## Pages

- [Agent mode](https://undivisible.dev/agent): Single HTML page listing the same markdown with direct download links (no WebGL UI).
- [Home](https://undivisible.dev/): Full portfolio (not optimized for token use).

## Optional

- [GitHub profile README source](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/undivisible/undivisible/main/now.md): Upstream `now.md` when you need the latest before deploy sync.
